title: ParseError line/col sentinel 0 should be Option
description: ParseError (parse_error.rs) uses line: usize and col: usize where the value 0 is a sentinel meaning 'no position available' (form-layer errors). This is a stringly-typed pattern on numeric fields: callers must read documentation to learn that 0 is special. Idiomatic Rust would use Option<usize> for both fields, with None meaning 'no position'. This makes the absence of position information unambiguous in the type system and removes the special-case comment. The Display impl would check is_some() instead of > 0.
